sutta: months if among in residents follow the course of 5 things he takes pt on householders what 5 he incites them to greater virtue he makes them live in the mirror of dhamma when visiting the sikh he stirs up mindfulness saying let the variable once set up mindfulness that thing most worthwhile when many monks of the sangha have come he urges the householders to do good and when they give him food whether mean or choice he enjoys it and does not frustrate the gift of faith barely monks such a monk takes pity on householders so this manga is very good to householders and lay people if he incites them to practice the precepts and then he incites them to live according to dhamma and when he visits the other sikh monks he encourages them to stir up mindfulness and when many monks arrive he encourages householders to support them and whatever [Music] food or other requisite he receives he enjoys it does not frustrate the gift of faith and that means he does not either refuse to receive or waste it now by throwing it away or something the next utah is
